fields.professional_description: Cybersecurity Analyst specializing in ethical hacking, OSINT, and web application security. I identify vulnerabilities, analyze digital threats, and help strengthen systems through responsible security testing and research.

fields.description:
6th-semester student, learning
software development, cyber security, databases, networking,
and operating systems.

fields.name: Cybersecurity
fields.description: Understanding of security fundamentals, threats, vulnerabilities, and responsible security testing.

fields.name: Nmap
fields.description: Network scanning, port discovery, service detection, and basic enumeration.

fields.name: Burp Suite
fields.description: Web request interception, modification, and basic vulnerability testing.

fields.name: Wireshark
fields.description: Network traffic inspection and basic packet analysis.

fields.name: Python
fields.description: Description: Python programming for automation, academic projects, and backend development.

fields.name: Django
fields.description: Dynamic web development using models, views, templates, admin, and database integration.

fields.name: SQL
fields.description: Database fundamentals, queries, tables, and relational concepts.

fields.name: OSINT and Reconnaissance
fields.description: Information gathering and reconnaissance using ethical and publicly available sources.

fields.title: AI-Based Defence System Developer
fields.description:
Developed a cybersecurity-focused AI solution during a
national-level technology competition. Contributed to the
design, implementation, and presentation of the proposed
defence system. Achieved a Top 13 position nationwide.

fields.title: Cybersecurity Practical Lab Experience
fields.description:
Built and used controlled cybersecurity lab environments
for vulnerability assessment, reconnaissance, network
analysis, and web application security testing.
fields.technologies: Kali Linux, Nmap, Burp Suite, Wireshark, Metasploit, DVWA

fields.title: Hate Speech Detection System
fields.short_description: A machine-learning system that identifies hateful and non-hateful text using dataset preprocessing, lexicon-based features, and model comparison.
fields.description: Developed a text-classification system using a labelled hate-speech dataset. The data was cleaned and transformed into numerical features using NLP and lexicon-based techniques. Multiple machine-learning algorithms were trained and compared to evaluate their classification performance.
fields.technologies: Python, Pandas, Scikit-learn, NLP, Lexicon Analysis, Machine Learning

fields.title: Custom AI Chatbot
fields.short_description: A custom conversational chatbot built using the OpenAI SDK and prompt-based response control.
fields.description: Created an AI chatbot that accepts user messages and generates context-aware responses through the OpenAI SDK. System instructions were used to control the chatbot’s behaviour and communication style. API credentials were managed securely using environment variables.
fields.technologies: Python, OpenAI SDK, Prompt Engineering, API Integration

fields.title: AI Agent System
fields.short_description: An AI-agent application capable of using tools and completing structured, multi-step tasks.
fields.description: Developed an AI agent using the OpenAI SDK with tool-calling and task-processing capabilities. Unlike a basic chatbot, the agent can analyse a request, select an appropriate tool, and complete multiple steps before returning the final response.
fields.technologies: Python, OpenAI SDK, Tool Calling, AI Agents, API Integration

fields.title: Operating Systems Demonstration
fields.short_description: An academic operating-systems project demonstrating major OS concepts through practical implementations.
fields.description: Developed an educational project to demonstrate operating-system concepts such as process management, scheduling, memory handling, and system operations. The project helped connect theoretical OS concepts with practical programming and execution behaviour.
fields.technologies: C or C++, Processes, Threads, Scheduling, Memory Management

fields.title: AI-Based Defence System
fields.short_description: A cybersecurity-focused AI solution developed for the Uraan AI Techathon, achieving a Top 13 position nationwide.
fields.description: Designed a proposed AI-based defence solution for identifying and responding to potential digital threats. The project combined artificial intelligence and cybersecurity concepts and was presented during the national Uraan AI Techathon, where it achieved a Top 13 position.
